title: A follow-up 'Compare that to Vivaha' must resolve against the prior subject, not a generic fallback
question: Compare that to Vivaha
required_scope_note: RELATIONSHIP is the intended scope; a resolved contrast restates prior evidence so the stored scope may read PROJECT. The binding invariant is that the follow-up resolves and cites BOTH repos, never the generic fallback.
note: Follow-up resolution: 'that' refers to the previous subject (friday-v3). The contrast must become a RELATIONSHIP/COMPARE and reference both repos, never the bare 'couldn't determine' fallback.
